services.name: API Gateway
services.description: Edge routing and request orchestration for all public APIs and web/mobile clients.

critical_journeys.name: api_request_routing
critical_journeys.description: Client requests are routed to the correct backend and receive successful responses.

critical_journeys.name: health_check
critical_journeys.description: Load balancer health checks confirm healthy targets to prevent misrouting.

services.name: Auth Service
services.description: Handles signup, login, token issuance, password reset, and session validation.

critical_journeys.name: signup
critical_journeys.description: New users create accounts with email verification.

critical_journeys.name: login
critical_journeys.description: Users authenticate and receive session tokens.

critical_journeys.name: password_reset
critical_journeys.description: Password reset link delivery and credential update.

critical_journeys.name: token_issue
critical_journeys.description: JWT token issuance and refresh flow for clients.

services.name: Marketplace Service
services.description: Product catalog, search, cart, and coordination with payments to complete checkout.

critical_journeys.name: browse_catalog
critical_journeys.description: Users browse product listings and category pages.

critical_journeys.name: search
critical_journeys.description: Users search for products with filters and relevance.

critical_journeys.name: add_to_cart
critical_journeys.description: Users add items to cart and see updates instantly.

critical_journeys.name: checkout
critical_journeys.description: Users review cart and proceed to payment confirmation.

services.name: Payments Service
services.description: Payment authorization, capture, and refunds with external payment provider.

critical_journeys.name: authorize_charge
critical_journeys.description: Authorize payment method for an order.

critical_journeys.name: capture_charge
critical_journeys.description: Capture payment for an order after confirmation.

critical_journeys.name: refund_payment
critical_journeys.description: Process refunds for canceled or returned orders.

services.name: Notifications Service
services.description: Email and push notification delivery for order confirmations and account flows.

critical_journeys.name: push_notification
critical_journeys.description: Mobile push for promotions and updates.

services.name: Analytics Service
services.description: Event ingestion, ETL pipeline, and dashboards for business metrics.

critical_journeys.name: analytics_dashboard_load
critical_journeys.description: Business dashboard loads with current metrics.

critical_journeys.name: data_pipeline_freshness
critical_journeys.description: ETL pipeline ensures fresh data at expected intervals.
